zh.lifeSummary: 當Ciceley Bishop於1511年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓 聖 邁克爾時，她的父親Richard Bishop41歲，母親Muriel38歲。她於1526年與Thomas Aldrich在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和12個女兒的父母。她去世於1584年10月15日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可曼格林 霍爾享年73歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾本森聖 倫恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ciceley Bishop于1511年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓 聖 邁克爾时，她的父亲Richard Bishop41岁，母亲Muriel38岁。她于1526年与Thomas Aldrich在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和12个女儿的父母。她去世于1584年10月15日在英国英格兰諾福爾可曼格林 霍爾享年73岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾本森聖 倫恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Bishop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English bissop, biscop, Old English bisc(e)op ‘bishop’, which comes via Latin from Greek episkopos ‘overseer’. The Greek word was adopted early in the Christian era as a title for an overseer of a local community of Christians, and has yielded cognates in every European language: French évêque, Italian vescovo, Spanish obispo, Russian yepiskop, German Bischof, etc. The word came to be applied as a surname for a variety of reasons, among them a supposed resemblance in bearing or appearance to a bishop, and selection as the ‘boy bishop’ on Saint Nicholas's Feast Day. In some instances the surname is from the rare Middle English (Old English) personal name Biscop ‘bishop’. As an Irish surname it is adopted for Mac Giolla Easpaig, meaning ‘servant of the bishop’ (see Gillespie ). In North America, this surname has absorbed, by assimilation and translation, at least some of continental European cognates, e.g. German Bischoff , Polish, Rusyn, Czech, and Slovak Biskup , Slovenian Škof (see Skoff ).

variants.name: Bischoff
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Bernhard, Hans, Klaus, Lorenz, Alois, Armin, Arno, Dieter, Fritz.

German: from Middle High German bischof, Middle Low German bischop ‘bishop’, probably applied as a nickname for someone with a pompous manner or as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a bishop. See also Bishop .

variants.name: Bispo
meanings: Portuguese and Galician: nickname from bispo ‘bishop’ (see Bishop ).

variants.name: Gillespie
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): shortened Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Gille Easbuig, borrowed into Irish as Mac Giolla Easpaig, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of the bishop’.

variants.name: Episcopo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Orazio, Pasquale, Rocco.

Italian: from episcopo ‘bishop’ (from Latin episcopus (see Bishop ), probably a nickname for someone who had a pious manner or perhaps a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a bishop).

variants.name: Dean
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English dene ‘valley’ (Old English denu), or a habitational name from any of several places in various parts of England named Dean or Dene from this word.

English: nickname or occupational name for the servant of a dean or nickname for someone thought to resemble a dean. A dean was an ecclesiastical official, the head of a chapter of canons or a church official with jurisdiction over a sub-division of an archdeaconry. Though no doubt some deans had illegitimate children, they were officially celibate, and in the main the surname is probably a nickname in origin, similar to Bishop , Prior , Priest , and Monk . The Middle English word deen, dien, dein, is a borrowing of Old French d(e)ien, doien from Latin decanus (originally a leader of ten men, from decem ‘ten’), and thus is a cognate of Deacon .
English: from the Middle English personal name Deyne (or Dene) a rhyming pet form of Reynald (see Reginald ).

nameMeanings.name: Ciceley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Ciceley Bishop was born in 1511, in Long Stratton St Michael, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Bishop, was 41 and her mother, Muriel, was 38. She married Thomas Aldrich in 1526, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 12 daughters. She died on 15 October 1584, in Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in St Helen's Church, Benson, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ciceley Bishop est née en 1511, à Long Stratton St Michael, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Bishop, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Muriel, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Aldrich en 1526, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 12 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 octobre 1584, à Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à St Helen's Church, Benson, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ciceley Bishop è nata il nel 1511 nel Long Stratton St Michael, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Bishop, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Muriel, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Aldrich nel 1526, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 12 figlie. Morì il 15 ottobre 1584, nel Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a St Helen's Church, Benson, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ciceley Bishopが1511年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロング ストラットオン スト ミチャエルで生まれた時，父Richard Bishopは41歳，母Murielは38歳であった。1526年にイギリスノーフォルクでThomas Aldrichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼女は1584年10月15日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクマングレン ハルで73歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアベンソンスト ヘレン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Long Stratton St Michael, Norfolk, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴 스트 믹하얼
ko.Saint Helen's Church, Benson, South Oxfo: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 벤슨 스트 헬'스 c후르치
ko.St Helen's Church, Benson, Oxfordshire,: 영국 스퍼드실르 벤슨 스트 헬'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Ciceley Bishop(이)가 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴 스트 믹하얼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Bishop(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Muriel(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1526년 영국 노르폴크에서 Thomas Aldrich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1584년 10월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 만그린 홀에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 벤슨 스트 헬'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ciceley Bishop nasceu em 1511, em Long Stratton St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Bishop, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Muriel, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Aldrich em 1526, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 12 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1584, em Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em St Helen's Church, Benson, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Helen's Church, Benson, South Oxfo: ст хелен'с чурч, бенсон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ciceley Bishop родилась в 1511 г. в местности лонг страттон ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Bishop было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Muriel, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Aldrich в 1526 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 12 дочерей. Она умерла 15 октября 1584 г. в местности мангрин холл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности ст хелен'с чурч, бенсон, оксфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Aldrich en 1526, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 12 hijas. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1584, en Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en St Helen's Church, Benson, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
